docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-11-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-11-2010 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BRAD KAPLAN. APPEARANCE BY ALL PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-11-2010 - JUDGMENT.
CORRESPONDENCE LETTER IN UN-OPENED ENVELOPE FROM THE PLAINTIFF CARONDA DAGGS ADDRESSED TO JPT SASHA CUMMINGS, RECEIVED.
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAGGS, CARONDA AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, VINCENT
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-03-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF DAGGS, CARONDA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAGGS, CARONDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JONES, VINCENT $1,082.95 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,112.95, PLAINTIFF SHALL MAKE THE BOWFLEX AVAILABLE FOR DEFENDANT TO PICK UP AT A MUTUALLY CONVENIENT TIME FIFTEEN DAYS AFTER DEFENDANT PAYS THIS JUDGMENT. UPON SATISFACTION OF THE JUDGMENT, DEFENDANT SHALL OWN THE BOWFLEX. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT JONES, VINCENT HEARING SET FOR MAR-05-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED DEC-14-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, VINCENT

MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY VINCENT JONES IS GRANTED. THE JUDGEMNT DEBTOR MAY PAY THE JUDGMENT AS FOLLOWS: PAY $500.00 OR MORE ON THE 1ST OF EVERY MONTH STARTING AUGUST 1, 2010 UNTIL THE JUDGMENT IS FULLY PAID. JUDGE PRO TEM: SASHA CUMMINGS. CLERK: SAJA R. (S.VANTREE)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,082.95 FILED BY DAGGS, CARONDA AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, VINCENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-11-2010 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BRAD KAPLAN FILED BY DAGGS, CARONDA JONES, VINCENT
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-05-2010 - DEPT. 506, JPT: SASHA CUMMINGS, CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF 03-05-10. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT.
